details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements satisfied: (1) New provider package with proper package.json structure created under packages/pixelart/; (2) createPixelArt factory function exported from pixelart-provider.ts; (3) PixelArtProvider interface implements ProviderV3 with image/imageModel methods; (4) PixelArtImageModel class implements ImageModelV3 with doGenerate method for image generation; (5) Image settings fully support size parameter, style enum with 'pixel'/'retro'/'8bit' options, and pixel density validation (1-64); (6) Base URL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'; (7) Package structure mirrors existing AI SDK providers with proper tsup/vitest configs, TypeScript setup, and build scripts; (8) Only new files created in packages/pixelart/ - single root tsconfig.json modification is minimal and necessary for integration. Comprehensive test coverage included. Image-only provider correctly rejects chat/embedding/text models with NoSuchModelError.
